citation.description: validate_creation_channel('jira') called before writing CREATE, creation_channel='jira' passed to ensure_identity_for for placeholder identities

criteria.criterion: A newly materialized inbound Jira issue and any placeholder identity created by that path persist validated creation_channel=jira, independent of reconciler author/env overrides; the direct writer rejects an off-vocabulary injected value. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/mutate/test_creation_channel_jira.py -k inbound_recorded.

citation.description: test_outbound_sync_edit_preserves_creation_channel verifies python ticket stays python after edits/claims; _IMMUTABLE_EDIT_FIELDS in _processors.py guards the field

criteria.criterion: Binding or pushing an existing cli/mcp/python ticket to Jira never changes its stored or projected creation_channel. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/mutate/test_creation_channel_jira.py -k outbound.

citation.description: _creation_channel='import' pinned in create_kwargs; test_import_records_import_channel verifies the local ticket gets import channel while source_id is preserved

criteria.criterion: NDJSON import persists creation_channel=import on the new local CREATE, preserves source_* provenance, and does not copy the exported source ticket channel into the new local channel. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/interfaces/io/test_creation_channel_import.py -k import.

citation.description: TicketState schema includes both creation_channel and creation_channel_inferred; test_export_includes_creation_channel (in test_creation_channel_import.py) verifies creation_channel appears in exported records; test_export_ndjson.py validates all lines against export schema

criteria.criterion: NDJSON export includes creation_channel plus creation_channel_inferred when present, using the TicketState output contract without a parallel serializer rule, and the full export suite remains green. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/interfaces/io/test_export_ndjson.py.

citation.description: _project_legacy_creation_channel implemented; test_legacy_positive_infers_jira_with_marker confirms all three signals produce jira+inferred

criteria.criterion: A legacy full-log ticket with no recorded channel projects jira plus creation_channel_inferred=true only when jira-* ID, reconciler author, and reconciler env_id all match exactly. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/mutate/test_creation_channel_jira.py -k legacy_positive.

citation.description: test_legacy_negative_near_miss_is_unknown with 5 parametrized cases (non-jira id, wrong author, wrong env_id, missing author, missing env_id) all produce unknown; inference function only reads ticket_id/author/env_id so tags/bindings/source_* cannot affect it

criteria.criterion: Removing or changing each inference signal independently produces creation_channel=unknown with no inference marker; tags, bindings, source_* metadata, and titles never affect the decision. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/mutate/test_creation_channel_jira.py -k legacy_negative.

citation.description: test_import_idempotency.py and test_import_ndjson.py exist in tests/interfaces/io/; test_inbound_leaf_bodies.py exists in tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/mutate/

criteria.criterion: Existing import idempotency and reconciler inbound behavior remain green. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/interfaces/io/test_import_idempotency.py tests/interfaces/io/test_import_ndjson.py tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/mutate/test_inbound_leaf_bodies.py.

citation.description: test_output_schemas_pin_creation_channel_trust_boundary reads docs/output-schemas.md and asserts 'creation_channel_inferred' + 'audit' + 'security attestation' are present; output-schemas.md lines 96-100 contain the trust boundary language; test_env_aliasing.py has test_inbound_translate_event_meta_uses_shared_legacy_constants verifying spec-loaded inbound_translate resolves rebar.reducer._version constants

criteria.criterion: Isolated spec-loading of inbound_translate resolves the shared legacy constants plus exact defaults without sibling-package context. TicketState output regression remains green. docs/output-schemas.md states that creation_channel_inferred is diagnostic metadata rather than a security attestation. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/mutate/test_env_aliasing.py tests/interfaces/contracts/test_schema_outputs.py tests/interfaces/contracts/test_schema_coverage.py && make lint.
